prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为：2021年约900名、2022年约912名、2024年约968名、2025年约531名。2023年。2025年位次大幅前移（较2024年前移约437名），主要因云南省2025年首次实施新高考，选科要求（首选物理+再选化学）显著缩小了竞争池，导致录取位次跳跃式上升。近4年整体呈波动中前移趋势，2025年基准位次约531名；2021–2022年本省理科计划均为37人，2024年理科计划32人，2025年物理类计划13人（因新高考分科细化）。2026年物理类计划12人，较2025年缩招1人（-7.7%），小幅缩招对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属哈工大体系。软科中国大学排名中哈工大校本部2026年位列第12名，近年排名稳居全国前15，学校层次顶尖；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映考生关注度较高，可能推高报考竞争。未见明显投档断档记录；依托哈工大校本部学科评估结果，拥有力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A等17个A-及以上学科，工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业2026年社会热度均为高热推荐或高热，与该校招生专业高度契合，进一步推高报考热度。本省2026年普通高考总人数约37.79万人，较2025年（约28.57万人）大幅增长约32.3%；物理类考生按历史比例估算约22.92万人，较2025年（17.33万人）增长约32.3%，竞争显著加剧。；该校位于深圳市（一线城市），在地域偏好上对西南地区考生有较强吸引力；学校在云南招生计划较少（12-13人），稀缺性进一步推高竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的基准、2026年物理类考生大幅增长（+32.3%）带来的竞争加剧、抖音高热及专业热度推高的报考关注度，以及2026年计划小幅缩招（-7.7%）的微弱缓解作用，预计2026年最低位次在2025年531名基础上略有后移（位次数字增大）。预测最低位次约532名，区间471–593名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were: approximately 900 in 2021, 912 in 2022, 968 in 2024, and 531 in 2025. 2023 data is missing. The ranking in 2025 significantly advanced (by about 437 places compared to 2024), mainly due to Yunnan Province implementing the new college entrance examination for the first time in 2025, where subject selection requirements (first choice physics + second choice chemistry) significantly narrowed the competition pool, leading to a jump in admission rankings. Over the past 4 years, the overall trend has been fluctuating but advancing. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 531. From 2021 to 2022, the provincial science enrollment plan was 37 students each year; in 2024, it was 32 science students; in 2025, the physics category plan was 13 students (due to the new exam's subject refinement). In 2026, the physics category plan is 12 students, a reduction of 1 student (-7.7%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, belonging to the HIT system. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, HIT's main campus ranked 12th, consistently in the top 15 nationally, indicating a top-tier school level. The 2026 reputation assessment is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 10th (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high candidate attention, which may increase competition for admission. No obvious records of admission gaps or drops have been observed. Relying on HIT's main campus discipline evaluation results, it has 17 A- or above disciplines, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, and Control Science and Engineering A, making its engineering strength top in the country and highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended or high-heat in social popularity, closely matching the university's enrollment majors, further boosting application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700). Physics category candidates, estimated by historical proportion, are about 229,200, an increase of about 32.3% from 2025 (173,300), significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Shenzhen (a first-tier city), which has strong appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan is small (12-13 students), and the scarcity further increases competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the significant ranking advance in 2025, the sharp increase in physics category candidates in 2026 (+32.3%) intensifying competition, the high Douyin heat and major popularity boosting application attention, and the slight easing effect of the small enrollment reduction in 2026 (-7.7%), it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 531. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 532, with a range of 471 to 593.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, this university only enrolls 2 majors with a total of 12 students in Yunnan's physics category, an extremely small enrollment scale. For rankings within the predicted range (471-593), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target and Tier 1 as a reach. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<471), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors. For rankings near the upper limit (>593), caution is advised, and it is recommended to pair with other universities as safety options.
